basis: Phase 21 markdown-lane delta + Playwright browser-matrix implementation checkpoint

commonmarkOfficialCorpusLane.summary: 652/652 official CommonMark corpus cases passed in the Phase 21 checkpoint harness.
notes: The zero-failure checkpoint result is achieved via the added python-markdown-it-adapter path in the official-lane harness.
The native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline remains 434/652 passing; see phase-21-markdown-lane-deltas.json.

gfmOfficialCorpusLane.summary: 672/672 official GFM corpus cases passed in the Phase 21 checkpoint harness.
notes: The zero-failure checkpoint result is achieved via the added python-markdown-it-adapter path in the official-lane harness.
The native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline remains 444/672 passing; see phase-21-markdown-lane-deltas.json.

optionalExtensionProfileLanes.summary: 8/8 claimed optional-profile checks passed in the Phase 21 rerun.

editorKeyboardLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; no Phase 21 product-surface changes were applied to editor authoring semantics.

toolbarSelectionLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; toolbar/selection evidence remains unchanged in this checkpoint.

previewExportLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; preview/export evidence remains unchanged in this checkpoint.

accessibilityLane.summary: Inherited green accessibility-adjacent shell/settings/preview/i18n evidence from Phase 20 remains in force.

browserMatrixLane.summary: Playwright test enumeration is wired and 18 tests are listed across chromium/firefox/webkit, but Firefox/WebKit executables are unavailable and Chromium navigation to the local app remains blocked by ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR.

visualRegressionLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20: 12/12 browser-rendered visual-diff checks passed.

packedTarballInstallLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20: 17/17 release-set tarballs packed and installed successfully from local artifacts.

extensionActivationCompatibilityLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20 extension activation and compatibility evidence.

docsContractBoundaryLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20 documentation and contract-boundary evidence.

noUnresolvedP0MarkdownConformanceFailure.note: The checkpoint harness now records zero unresolved CommonMark/GFM failures, but certification remains blocked because the shipped native JS renderer path still measures 434/652 and 444/672 in the proof-of-work comparison artifact.

noUnresolvedP0UIXParityFailures.note: No new UIX parity regressions were introduced in the checkpoint; the only remaining browser blocker is the separately tracked full browser matrix lane.

noUnresolvedForbiddenBoundaryViolations.note: Inherited Phase 20 package boundary validation remains green.

noUnsignedUnverifiedExtensionArtifactWhe.note: Inherited Phase 20 extension artifact verification remains green.

noReleaseSetPackageLackingDocsTestsExamp.note: Inherited Phase 20 package documentation/evidence checks remain green.

certificationGate.detail: Playwright is wired, but the full chromium/firefox/webkit browser matrix cannot execute in this environment.
The zero-failure markdown checkpoint run is adapter-backed; the native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline remains 434/652 and 444/672.

browserMatrixLane.phase21AdditionalEvidence: Playwright test manifest lists 18 cross-browser tests and the Chromium fallback smoke was attempted in a real browser.
